label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's think about how a typical person might answer this question about causation. The question is asking whether the administrative assistant caused the problem of the receptionist not having any pens left. I need to understand the situation first: - The receptionist keeps pens on her desk. - Administrative assistants are allowed to take the pens. - Faculty members (like Professor Smith) are supposed to buy their own pens. - Administrative assistants typically take the pens. - Faculty members also take the pens despite being told they shouldn't. - The receptionist has sent reminders to faculty members. - On Monday morning, an administrative assistant and Professor Smith both take pens. - Later that day, the receptionist has no pens left and needs to take an important message, but she can't because there are no pens. The question is whether
